title: Twitch's Women's Day Event has been a Disaster
description:
Twitch announced their official International Women's Day event, however, the entire thing has caused a divide; with some women enjoying the celebration and having fun and yet others finding the entire thing extremely offensive and even insulting the women who don't view it that way.
